# minio_server_config_scanner (Resource)

Manages MinIO object scanner configuration. The scanner handles background tasks like lifecycle expiration, healing, and versioning cleanup.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "minio_server_config_scanner" "main" {
  speed = "slow"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cycle` (String) Time between full scanner cycles (e.g., "1m").
- `delay` (String) Scanner delay multiplier between operations.
- `excess_folders` (String) Alert threshold for excess folders per prefix.
- `excess_versions` (String) Alert threshold for excess object versions per prefix.
- `max_wait` (String) Maximum wait between scanner cycles (e.g., "15s").
- `speed` (String) Scanner speed preset: fastest, fast, default, slow, or slowest.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The scanner configuration identifier
- `restart_required` (Boolean) Whether a MinIO server restart is required.

## Import

```shell
terraform import minio_server_config_scanner.example scanner
```
